title: gnidia fraterna
intro: Gnidia fraterna, also known as the bitter bush, is a shrub-like plant native to South Africa, characterized by its yellow flowers and bitter taste. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Gnidia fraterna include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. Herbal preparations of Gnidia fraterna, such as teas and infusions, can be made by drying the leaves and flowers, which can then be steeped in hot water to create a bitter and potentially medicinal drink.
